title: Validate UI and content locking after pausing a trial
description: Tests that pausing the trial correctly updates the UI on the homepage and Trial Corner, and locks access to premium content as specified.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' Hub and click 'Pause Trial'.
2. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. Navigate back to the Trial Corner.
5. Attempt to play content from the 'Engagement' or 'Trending' sections.

expected_result: The homepage widget updates to the 'paused design'. The Trial Corner shows a paused state. All content sections (Engagement, Trending) are visually locked and unplayable. The `pause-clicked` event is triggered.
